positive: A whimsical, vintage-style illustration of a fox wearing a tiny monocle, sitting in a pile of glowing mushrooms. The style should mimic storybook watercolor and ink sketches, highly detailed, vibrant yet muted color palette, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, overly digital, photorealistic
